response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar
REL Client -> ClientOrder : 1 -> 0..N : FK=client_id
ENTITY ClientOrder
PK order_id
ATTR order_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_id : integer : FK
ATTR order_date : date
REL ClientOrder -> OrderDetail : 1 -> 1..N : FK=order_id
ENTITY Material
PK material_id
ATTR material_id : integer : PK
ATTR material_name : varchar
REL OrderDetail -> Material : 0..N -> 1 : FK=material_id
ENTITY Operation
PK operation_id
ATTR operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR operation_name : varchar
REL OrderDetail -> Operation : 0..N -> 1 : FK=operation_id
ENTITY OrderDetail
PK order_id, material_id, operation_id, sequence_number
ATTR order_id : integer : PK : FK
ATTR material_id : integer : PK : FK
ATTR operation_id : integer : PK : FK
ATTR sequence_number : integer : PK
ATTR quantity : integer
ATTR scheduled_datetime : datetime
ATTR price : decimal
